message:
fix: add non-CGO build stubs for goreleaser cross-compilation

The Dolt-native refactoring removed the storage interface layer that
previously provided CGO_ENABLED=0 stubs. goreleaser uses CGO_ENABLED=0
for all cross-compilation targets, breaking the release build.

Add comprehensive non-CGO stubs:
- internal/storage/dolt/store_nocgo.go: DoltStore type and all methods
- cmd/bd/doctor/checks_nocgo.go: doctor check function stubs
- cmd/bd/doctor/resolve.go: resolveBeadsDir (shared between CGO/non-CGO)
- cmd/bd/bootstrap_nocgo.go: bootstrapEmbeddedDolt stub

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+//go:build !cgo
+
+package main
+
+import (
+	"context"
+
+	"github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/storage/dolt"
+)
+
+func bootstrapEmbeddedDolt(_ context.Context, _ string, _ *dolt.Config) error {
+	return nil
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+package doctor
+
+import "github.com/steveyegge/beads/internal/beads"
+
+// resolveBeadsDir follows any redirect/symlink in the beads directory.
+// Extracted from maintenance.go to be available in non-CGO builds.
+func resolveBeadsDir(beadsDir string) string {
+	return beads.FollowRedirect(beadsDir)
+}
